outlook_paragraph: SM's drilling activity shows moderate expansion with 13 active sites at decision date, 50% above the recent baseline, driven by one newly activated pad alongside sustained operations on 12 others. With half of production exposed to the current WTI environment at an average of $45.63/bbl and realized prices running 12% below benchmark, revenue is supported by stable operational performance in a mid-tier commodity price environment. The deterministic forecast of $654.2M reflects this balanced profile, with drilling momentum suggesting slight volume uptick in the quarter ended September 2024.
